allow: PowerShell($ErrorActionPreference = 'Continue'; Write-Output '=== aws-core ==='; $core = Start-Process -FilePath 'uvx' -ArgumentList 'awslabs.core-mcp-server' -PassThru -RedirectStandardError 'C:\\tmp\\core_err.txt' -RedirectStandardOutput 'C:\\tmp\\core_out.txt' -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; if \(-not $core.HasExited\) { Stop-Process -Id $core.Id -Force }; Get-Content C:\\tmp\\core_err.txt -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output ''; Write-Output '=== aws-diagram ==='; $diag = Start-Process -FilePath 'uvx' -ArgumentList 'awslabs.aws-diagram-mcp-server' -PassThru -RedirectStandardError 'C:\\tmp\\diag_err.txt' -RedirectStandardOutput 'C:\\tmp\\diag_out.txt' -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; if \(-not $diag.HasExited\) { Stop-Process -Id $diag.Id -Force }; Get-Content C:\\tmp\\diag_err.txt -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
